Explanation: The agent in question is maribavir (Livtencity), as supported by the 2022 study by Terri L Levien and Danial E Baker [83797], which matches the pharmacological and publication details. The FDA approval letter for Livtencity (NDA 215596) states: "If you have any questions, call Karen S. Kim, Regulatory Project Manager, at (301) 796-1235" [59631]. This is the full name as mentioned in the official approval letter.
Exact Answer: Karen S. Kim
Confidence: 100%
